sectionHeading.heading: Ship Sanity-backed marketing sites from Figma
sectionHeading.subheading: A Figma frame becomes a **typed** block in Studio, rendered by primitives you already trust. See the [technical overview](https://example.com/overview).

fields.description: Drop a design into the pipeline, review the generated plan, and apply the resulting seed to staging with a single command.

media.alt: Two teammates reviewing a Sanity Studio pageBuilder on a laptop.
